title: SURVEY: Antisocial Behaviour: Loud vehicle exhausts - Alex Davies-Jones for Pontypridd
h1: SURVEY: Antisocial Behaviour: Loud vehicle exhausts
text_excerpt: SURVEY: Antisocial Behaviour: Loud vehicle exhausts - Alex Davies-Jones for Pontypridd Skip to main content About | Amdanaf i News | Newyddion CAMPAIGNS | ymgyrchoedd SURVEY: Antisocial Behaviour: Loud vehicle exhausts Cost of Living Brochure (English) Cost of Living Brochure (Welsh) Save our A&E All-Party Parliamentary Group on Wrestling Pontypridd & Taff Ely Flood Report 2020 More Menu 31st August, 2023 SURVEY: Antisocial Behaviour: Loud vehicle exhausts A car exhaust. Image by Nerivill via pixabay.com. I want to hear from residents about the impact that noisy car exhausts are having on local communities. Vehicles that may have been modified may make ‘gunshot’ noises which have previously impacted specific parts of our community, including in Talbot Green and Llantrisant, but I’m concerned by reports of this anti-social behaviour taking place in other areas too. Exhausts specifically designed to backfire in this way are illegal – the sound emitted by an exhaust fitted to a standard car must not exceed 80dB. If you believe your local area has been affected by individuals using modified exhausts, please do fill in the short survey HERE . With your help, I will be able to continue to campaign in Westminster for more to be done to clamp down on this anti-social behaviour. The survey will run for six weeks until 16th October. In accordance with data protection laws, any information you submit will be held securely and not used for any other purpose without your consent or passed on to any third party.
